name: enable_beta_device
short_description: Enable all licensed beta devices matching an optional pattern
full_help:
enable_beta_device

Description: 
Enable all licensed beta devices matching an optional pattern

Syntax: 
enable_beta_device  [-quiet] [-verbose] [<pattern>]

Usage: 
  Name         Description
  ------------------------
  [-quiet]     Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]   Suspend message limits during command execution
  [<pattern>]  Enable parts matching pattern

Categories: 
Device

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
